---
name: Developer Onboarding
about: Initial local environment setup for new collaborators
title: '[Setup] Local Environment Initialization'
labels: 'setup, documentation'
assignees: ''
---
**Description:**
Welcome to the project! Before starting development, you need to get the local environment up and running. Please refer to the `[Link to Setup Doc]` for detailed instructions.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Generate and install the required local certificates to run the Identity Provider.
- [ ] Successfully build and run the Identity Provider locally.
- [ ] Create local releases for both backends.
- [ ] Copy the released backend binaries into the designated folder inside the client project.
- [ ] Successfully build and launch `Onyx.Oms.Client`.
- [ ] Verify that you can log in through the client app.
